VALUES: 00 = No Special Program 
01 = Early and periodic screening and diagnosis and treatment (EPSDT) 
02 = Family Planning 
03 = Rural Health Clinic (RHC) 
04 = Federally Qualified Health Centers (FQHC) 
05 = Indian Health Services (IHS) 
07 = Home and Community Based Care Waiver Services (HCBS) 
08 = Money Follows the Person (MFP) 
10 = Balancing Incentive Payment (BIP) 
11 = Community First Choice (1915(k)) 
12 = Medicaid Emergency Psychiatric
